name: y2k-neon
hypothesis: Y2K neon overlay (pink/cyan diagonal wash + 4px scan-lines + violet corner vignette + sweeping chromatic-aberration band) creates a thumb-stop palette signature on TikTok/Reels 2026 feeds without altering gameplay, hook, or endcard structure.

diff_from_baseline.scope: palette only — overlay applied at top of _paintOverlay, gated to skip endcard and forcewin phases so Sami's juice stays intact.

review_notes: Axis declared (palette) is correct, but the captured thumbnail shows no visible Y2K neon wash, scan-lines, vignette, or chromatic band — looks identical to baseline. Bundle differs from baseline by only ~1KB and the announced overlay function names (applyY2KPostFX, drawNeonAccent, scan-line, neon hex stops) are not detectable in the bundle. Either the overlay is too low-opacity to be visible (raise alpha) or the import/_paintOverlay wiring did not survive the build. Re-capture and verify the overlay actually paints. Bundle size OK (2.96 MB), no regression markers, combat loop intact.
